name: The Midnight Diner | Shinya Shokudo
description:
When people finish their day and hurry home, my day starts. My diner is open from midnight to seven in the morning. They call it "Midnight Diner."

~

The midnight diner is a little izakaya in Shinjuku. Take a moment and slip into your memories and comfort foods-- Master will cook anything you ask as long as he has the ingredients.
creator: Clementine00
